session_id: ANL-2026-04-25-l2规则使命宣言业务伤疤融入评判
session_folder: .workflow/.analysis/ANL-2026-04-25-l2规则使命宣言业务伤疤融入评判
summary: Integrate MISSION_STATEMENT as a first-class L2 rule section and BUSINESS_LOGIC_CHUNKS as a structured L2 section plus @fabric-anchor lifecycle governance.

implementation_scope.objective: Extend structured rule sections with MISSION_STATEMENT and BUSINESS_LOGIC_CHUNKS
acceptance_criteria: fab_get_rule_sections accepts both new section names
parser returns the requested new sections without full-content fallback
missing new sections produce warning diagnostics

implementation_scope.objective: Define L2 Markdown templates and documentation
acceptance_criteria: docs clarify these sections are fetch-stage content, not RuleDescription

implementation_scope.objective: Add doctor-only @fabric-anchor diagnostics for business chunks
acceptance_criteria: anchor IDs can be scanned from source files
missing or duplicate anchors produce diagnostics
stale anchors are reported by doctor without blocking commits

decision_context: MISSION_STATEMENT belongs in L2 Markdown section content because it is path-specific and should be read after script identity is known.
BUSINESS_LOGIC_CHUNKS needs section injection plus doctor-only source-code anchor diagnostics.
Pre-commit warnings and dynamic pruning were explicitly removed from the implementation scope.
RuleDescription should remain a lightweight plan-context index and should not carry full mission or scar content.
